bird.name: 紅嘴奎利亞雀
bird.summary: 紅嘴奎利亞雀（學名：Quelea quelea）是雀形目織布文鳥科奎利亞雀屬的一種小型鳥類。這種鳥分佈于撒哈拉以南非洲，共有三個亞種，是非洲的特有留鳥。這個物種是地球上數量最多的野生鳥類，達15億隻，僅次於被人類所豢養的家雞。其龐大的鳥群因主要以草及種子為食，且會四處移動，因此…

locations.name: 撒哈拉以南非洲
locations.summary: 撒哈拉以南非洲（英語：Sub-Saharan Africa）指撒哈拉沙漠以南的非洲地區，也稱黑非洲（Negro Africa）。自然地理上與衣索比亞界高度重疊。政治上，包括了所有或部分领土位于撒哈拉沙漠以南的国家（苏丹除外，尽管位于撒哈拉…

locations.name: 恩加米湖
locations.summary: Lake Ngami is an endorheic lake in Botswana, north of the Kalahari Desert.

relations.subject: 紅嘴奎利亞雀
relations.evidence: Random House Webster's Unabridged Dictionary. Quelea quelea), also known as the red-billed weaver or red-billed dioch, is a small, seasonally nomadic, sparrow-like bird of the weaver family, Ploceidae, native to sub-Saharan Africa

relations.subject: 紅嘴奎利亞雀
relations.evidence: Random House Webster's Unabridged Dictionary. Quelea quelea), also known as the red-billed weaver or red-billed dioch, is a small, seasonally nomadic, sparrow-like bird of the weaver family, Ploceidae, native to sub-Saharan Africa

relations.subject: 紅嘴奎利亞雀
relations.evidence: It is found in wet habitats, congregating at the shores of waterbodies, such as Lake Ngami, during flooding

relations.subject: 紅嘴奎利亞雀
relations.evidence: The red-billed quelea is mostly found in tropical and subtropical areas with a seasonal semi-arid climate, resulting in dry thornbush grassland, including the Sahel, and its distribution covers most of sub-Saharan Africa
